full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #10 (2026-04-23)

PULSE
Health: 0.5469 (C). 887 wallets, 146 contributors. 76 memos today vs 118 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
48 reward payments, 318857 PFT distributed to 24 contributors. Top earner: raL2kv...Gwzd (59640 PFT).

AIRDROPS
2 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 18,200 PFT. Highest: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (9,200 PFT). Lowest: r4ahFv...5XyU (9,000 PFT). 7-day leader: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (69,200 PFT, avg 9,886/day over 7 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rDVKRN...tyjB (69 memos). 16 new wallet(s) this week. 33 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
743 sybil accounts tracked across 1 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 82.6%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-03-24): 7531 transactions from 87 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA
